title: nigella arvensis var. divaricata
intro: Nigella arvensis var. divaricata, also known as wild fennel or Roman coriander, is a flowering plant in the family Ranunculaceae. It is used in herbal medicine, primarily for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Nigella arvensis var. divaricata include reducing inflammation, relieving digestive issues, and acting as an antimicrobial agent. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
